results.rendered_html:
!√kṣemay (von kṣema), kṣemayati nur partic.
1〉 rastend: ṛtasya sadasi kṣemayantam  ṚV. 3,7,2 .
— 2〉 Rast gewährend, beherbergend: te rāyaspoṣaṃ draviṇānyasme dhatta ṛbhavaḥ kṣemayanto na mitram  ṚV. 4,33,10 . catvāra īṃ bibhrati kṣemayanto daśa garbhaṃ carase dhāpayante 5,47,4 .
